data.title: Storebrand Nomination Committee Backs Continuity With Board Reappointment Slate for 2026–2027
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Storebrand ASA ( (GB:0NO0) ) has issued an update.

Storebrand ASA’s nomination committee has proposed reappointing the entire current board leadership for the 2026–2027 term, including chair Jarle Roth and vice chair Martin Skancke, alongside existing members Christel Elise Borge, Viveka Ekberg, Janne Flessum, Benjamin Kristoffer Golding, and Line M. Hestvik. The slate, to be voted on at the annual general meeting on 9 April 2026, signals a desire for continuity in corporate governance and strategic direction at the Nordic financial group, potentially reassuring investors and clients who value stability in oversight and long-term stewardship.

The recommendation keeps Storebrand’s board composition unchanged at a time when regulatory and sustainability expectations on financial institutions remain high. Maintaining the existing leadership team may help the company sustain its focus on sustainable finance and customer-centric offerings, while providing consistent guidance over capital allocation, risk management, and the execution of its growth and ESG agendas in its core Nordic markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:0NO0) stock is a Sell with a NOK150.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Storebrand ASA stock, see the GB:0NO0 Stock Forecast page.

More about Storebrand ASA

Storebrand ASA is a Nordic financial group headquartered at Lysaker outside Oslo, Norway, focused on providing savings, insurance, and pension solutions that promote financial security and wellness for individuals and companies. The group emphasizes sustainable financial products and responsible investment, serving about 61,000 corporate clients and 2.6 million individual customers, and manages NOK 1,609 billion in assets while being listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker STB.

Average Trading Volume: 713,985

Current Market Cap: NOK76.15B

data.title: Smart Capital Shareholders Approve Reverse Take-Over to Merge CrowdInvesting and Crowdfunding Assets
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Smart Capital S.P.A. ( (IT:SMCAP) ) just unveiled an update.

Smart Capital S.p.A., an Italian permanent capital industrial holding company active in private equity and PIPE deals with a focus on small and medium-sized enterprises, pursues long-term investments in niche market leaders guided by experienced management and ESG-aligned value creation strategies. Its portfolio spans listed, unlisted and pre-IPO companies in Italy and internationally.

The company’s shareholders have approved a reverse take-over transaction involving the merger by incorporation of its subsidiary Smart4Tech, listed crowdinvesting platform CrowdFundMe and equity crowdfunding specialist WeAreStarting into Smart Capital. Completion of the deal, expected in the first half of 2026 subject to agreed conditions, is set to consolidate traditional private capital activities with digital crowdinvesting and crowdfunding platforms, potentially strengthening Smart Capital’s role in alternative finance for Italian SMEs and broadening its capital-raising ecosystem.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:SMCAP) stock is a Buy with a EUR2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Smart Capital S.P.A. stock, see the IT:SMCAP Stock Forecast page.

More about Smart Capital S.P.A.

Smart Capital S.p.A. is a permanent capital industrial holding company focused on private equity and private investments in public equity, targeting small and medium-sized Italian enterprises at various stages, including listed, unlisted and pre-IPO. The group seeks long-term opportunities in niche market leaders with strong management teams and value creation plans aligned with ESG best practices, operating both in Italy and abroad.

Average Trading Volume: 69,359

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Allarity Therapeutics Secures $20 Million Structured Note Financing
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Allarity Therapeutics ( (ALLR) ) is now available.

On March 2, 2026, Allarity Therapeutics entered into a note purchase agreement with Streeterville Capital under which it issued an unsecured A-1 promissory note with an original principal amount of $10.93 million and a secured B note of $10 million, with $10 million paid to the company at closing and another $10 million deposited into a controlled account of a new wholly owned subsidiary. The notes, bearing interest of 9% and 5% respectively and maturing in 18 months, are secured by a deposit account control agreement, a subsidiary guaranty, and a pledge of subsidiary interests, and they impose tight covenants restricting new debt, variable-price or highly dilutive securities, new liens, subsidiary equity issuances, and subsidiary business operations, while providing the lender with monthly redemption rights, punitive trigger and default mechanics, and the ability to accelerate repayment, underscoring both Allarity’s near-term liquidity needs and the significant control ceded to its lender.

The financing includes a mechanism allowing portions of the secured B note to be exchanged into A notes once outstanding A note principal falls below a specified threshold, offering some structural flexibility in how the debt is held and repaid. However, the combination of security interests over key assets, limitations on alternative financings, and substantial default remedies signals a highly protective structure for Streeterville Capital that may constrain Allarity’s future capital-raising options and strategic freedom while the notes remain outstanding.

The most recent analyst rating on (ALLR) stock is a Sell with a $0.84 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Allarity Therapeutics stock, see the ALLR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ALLR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ALLR is a Underperform.

The score is weighed down primarily by weak financial performance—no revenue, ongoing losses, and sustained negative free cash flow—despite modest leverage and currently positive equity. Technicals also detract due to a clear downtrend with negative momentum, while valuation is constrained by negative earnings and lack of dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on ALLR stock, click here.

More about Allarity Therapeutics

Allarity Therapeutics, Inc. is a Delaware-based biopharmaceutical company focused on developing cancer therapies. The company raises capital through structured financing arrangements, including promissory notes and equity purchase agreements, to fund its operations and advance its oncology pipeline in the U.S. public markets.

Average Trading Volume: 160,035

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $16.4M

data.description:

Sen Yue Holdings Ltd. ( (SG:5BS) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Cenvios Holdings Pte. Ltd., through financial adviser ZICO Capital Pte. Ltd., has launched a voluntary unconditional general offer to acquire all issued and paid-up ordinary shares of Sen Yue Holdings Limited that it does not already own, control, or has agreed to acquire. The offer is formalised via an offer document dated 3 March 2026 and follows an initial announcement on 12 February 2026, marking a potential change in control that could reshape Sen Yue’s ownership structure and strategic direction, though detailed acceptance levels have yet to be disclosed.

ZICO Capital has announced, on behalf of the offeror, that it is providing an update on the level of acceptances in accordance with Singapore’s takeover regulations, signalling that the offer period is active and progressing. The outcome of this process will be closely watched by investors and other stakeholders, as it may affect governance, future corporate actions, and the company’s positioning within its market.

More about Sen Yue Holdings Ltd.

Sen Yue Holdings Limited is a Singapore-incorporated company listed on the local market, with issued and paid-up ordinary shares forming its capital base. Its shareholder register is now the subject of a takeover process initiated by Cenvios Holdings Pte. Ltd., indicating strategic interest in consolidating control over the business.

Current Market Cap: S$21.65M

data.title: Prenetics Launches $40 Million Buyback as IM8 Growth, Liquidity Bolster Valuation Case
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Prenetics Group ( (PRE) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 6, 2026, Prenetics announced that its board authorized a 12‑month share repurchase program of up to $40 million in Class A ordinary shares, underscoring management’s belief that the stock is undervalued. The move follows about $2.75 million of recent open‑market share purchases by executives, including CEO Danny Yeung, bringing total potential capital committed by insiders and the company to roughly $42.75 million.

The buyback is backed by approximately $164 million in adjusted liquidity and a zero‑debt balance sheet, supported by 2025–early 2026 divestitures that refocused the business on IM8. Management highlights IM8’s strong unit economics, 2026 revenue targets of $180–$200 million, and a stated path to adjusted EBITDA profitability by the fourth quarter of 2027, positioning the repurchase as a disciplined capital allocation decision aimed at enhancing shareholder value.

Under the program, Prenetics may repurchase shares via open market, block, or privately negotiated transactions, including through Rule 10b5‑1 trading plans, and retains discretion to modify, suspend, or discontinue the initiative. At current valuations cited by the company, its enterprise value implies a low revenue multiple for IM8, suggesting meaningful upside if execution on growth and profitability targets aligns with investor expectations.

The most recent analyst rating on (PRE) stock is a Hold with a $19.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Prenetics Group stock, see the PRE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PRE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PRE is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak financial performance (persistent losses and ongoing cash burn), despite improving revenue and gross margins and a currently strong balance sheet. The latest earnings call boosts the outlook with ambitious growth/margin guidance and strong liquidity, but near-term profitability remains negative and execution/concentration risks are material. Technicals are mixed with near-term weakness, and valuation is constrained by negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on PRE stock, click here.

More about Prenetics Group

Prenetics Global Limited is a Nasdaq-listed health sciences company focused on consumer health and longevity. Its flagship brand, IM8, co-founded with David Beckham and endorsed by elite athletes, offers premium, science-backed daily nutrition products and has rapidly scaled past $100 million in annualized recurring revenue across more than 30 countries.

Positioned in the fast-growing wellness and supplements market, Prenetics has streamlined its portfolio via divestitures to concentrate capital and operations on IM8’s high-growth, high-margin profile. The company reports substantial liquidity, no debt, and targets adjusted EBITDA profitability as IM8 continues global expansion.

Average Trading Volume: 241,588

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $253.6M

Premium Brands ( (TSE:PBH) ) has provided an announcement.

Premium Brands Holdings Corporation will release its fourth quarter 2025 financial results on March 19, 2026, providing investors with management’s pre-recorded remarks, detailed financial statements, segment information and an investor presentation via its website early that morning. President and CEO George Paleologou and CFO Will Kalutycz will also host a live question-and-answer session later that day, signaling ongoing engagement with analysts and shareholders and offering additional insight into the company’s performance and strategic direction.

The company will make a recording of the question-and-answer session available by phone and on its website through April 19, 2026, ensuring broader access for investors and other stakeholders who cannot attend live. This communications schedule underscores Premium Brands’ emphasis on transparency and accessibility as it reports on its latest quarter, which may be closely watched given its position in the specialty food manufacturing and distribution sector across Canada and the U.S.

data.title: SPC Nickel Launches $6.6 Million Private Placement to Advance Critical Minerals Exploration
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from SPC Nickel ( (TSE:SPC) ) is now available.

SPC Nickel Corp. has announced a non-brokered private placement to raise up to $6.6 million through the issuance of common share units and charity flow-through units, each bundled with half-warrants exercisable over 18 months. The company may also pay cash commissions and issue compensation warrants to eligible finders, with all securities subject to a four-month resale restriction pending TSX Venture Exchange approval.

Proceeds from the charity flow-through units will fund Canadian Exploration Expenses that qualify as flow-through mining expenditures and benefit from the federal Critical Minerals Exploration Tax Credit. Funds raised from the common share units will support general working capital, bolstering SPC Nickel’s ability to advance its Muskox and Lockerby East projects and reinforcing its positioning in Canada’s critical minerals exploration sector.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SPC) stock is a Sell with a C$0.08 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SPC Nickel stock, see the TSE:SPC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:SPC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:SPC is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (no revenue, ongoing losses, and negative free cash flow with a declining equity base). Technicals also detract, with bearish trend signals and weak momentum. Valuation contributes limited support because the negative P/E reflects losses and no dividend yield is available.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:SPC stock, click here.

More about SPC Nickel

SPC Nickel Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on high-grade polymetallic copper-nickel-platinum group metals in Nunavut and the Sudbury Mining Camp. Its key assets include the district-scale Muskox Project in Nunavut and the 100%-owned Lockerby East project in Sudbury, which hosts the West Graham and LKE resources in Tier-1 jurisdictions across Canada.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Wellchange Holdings Overhauls Board With New Independent Directors After Resignations
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Wellchange Holdings Company Limited ( (WCT) ) is now available.

On February 25, 2026, Wellchange Holdings Company Limited appointed Jun Liu as an independent director and member of its audit, compensation and nomination committees, bringing more than two decades of experience in finance, investment and asset management to the board. The same day, the company also named legal and compliance specialist Yiyun Wang as an independent director, chair of the compensation committee and member of the audit and nominating committees, with both appointees deemed independent under Nasdaq rules and each receiving annual compensation of US$20,000.

On February 26, 2026, independent directors Lau Yun Chau and Chu Chi Hong resigned from the board with immediate effect upon delivery of their written notices, prompting a reshuffle of the company’s independent oversight. The rapid transition in board composition concentrates fresh expertise in finance and legal compliance at the committee level, which may strengthen Wellchange’s governance and regulatory alignment but also marks a notable turnover in its independent director ranks within a short time frame.

More about Wellchange Holdings Company Limited

Wellchange Holdings Company Limited, a Cayman Islands-incorporated company headquartered in Hong Kong, is listed on Nasdaq as a foreign private issuer and operates under U.S. securities regulation applicable to overseas issuers. The company’s governance framework follows Nasdaq’s independence standards, with a board and key committees overseeing audit, compensation and nominations.

data.title: Corporación América Airports Files AA2000 2025 Results in Form 6-K, Cautions on Comparability
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Corporacion America Airports SA ( (CAAP) ) has issued an update.

Corporación América Airports has filed a Form 6-K dated March 6, 2026, to furnish English translations of Aeropuertos Argentina 2000’s stand-alone condensed consolidated and individual financial statements for the quarter and twelve-month period ended December 31, 2025. The Argentine subsidiary’s reports, prepared under a CNV framework based on IFRS and audited under international standards, are made available to CAAP shareholders because AA2000’s debt is publicly offered in Argentina and listed in Luxembourg.

The company stresses that AA2000’s 2025 financial statements, presented in Argentine pesos with a different IFRS transition date and reporting currency, are not directly comparable to CAAP’s Argentina segment in its own consolidated accounts. Management emphasizes that these figures are provided solely for informational purposes and should not be viewed as indicative of how the Argentine segment will appear in CAAP’s future consolidated financial statements, limiting their use for cross-entity performance comparisons by investors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (CAAP) stock is a Buy with a $33.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Corporacion America Airports SA stock, see the CAAP Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CAAP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CAAP is a Outperform.

Corporacion America Airports SA’s overall stock score is driven by strong earnings call performance and solid financial health. The technical analysis indicates potential overbought conditions, and the valuation suggests moderate pricing. The absence of corporate events and dividend yield slightly tempers the score.

To see Spark’s full report on CAAP stock, click here.

More about Corporacion America Airports SA

Corporación América Airports S.A. (CAAP) is a Luxembourg-based airport operator that controls airport assets primarily through subsidiaries such as Aeropuertos Argentina 2000 S.A. in Argentina. Its core business involves the exploitation, administration and operation of airports, with activities financed in part through publicly offered debt securities listed in Argentina and on the Luxembourg Stock Exchange.

data.title: NICE’s Cognigy Named Sole Customers’ Choice in Gartner 2025 Conversational AI Report
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

NICE ( (NICE) ) has issued an update.

On February 3, 2026, NICE announced that its NiCE Cognigy platform was named the sole Customers’ Choice in Gartner’s 2025 Peer Insights “Voice of the Customer” for Enterprise Conversational AI Platforms, based entirely on verified user reviews. The distinction, underpinned by a 4.8 out of 5 rating from 138 customer assessments as of January 14, 2026, reinforces NICE’s positioning as a trusted leader in conversational and agentic AI, complementing its recent Leader status in Gartner’s Magic Quadrant and strengthening its appeal to enterprises evaluating large-scale AI-first CX deployments.

The recognition signals strong user satisfaction with NiCE Cognigy’s ability to deliver hyper-personalized, multilingual, automated service across voice and digital channels. For NICE’s customers and prospects, the combination of analyst and peer validation is likely to influence buying decisions in the enterprise conversational AI market and underscores the platform’s perceived long-term value and successful deployment track record.

The most recent analyst rating on (NICE) stock is a Buy with a $150.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NICE stock, see the NICE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NICE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NICE is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong fundamentals (high profitability, improving returns, and low leverage) and a supportive earnings outlook for revenue/cloud growth and AI momentum. These positives are tempered by near-term EPS/margin pressure signaled in guidance and a mixed technical picture with the stock still below longer-term moving averages.

To see Spark’s full report on NICE stock, click here.

More about NICE

NICE Ltd., listed on Nasdaq, provides AI-powered customer experience and engagement platforms used by organizations in more than 150 countries. Its purpose-built technologies combine automation, generative and conversational AI to turn interactions into proactive, intelligent actions, helping enterprises connect people, systems and workflows, and deliver measurable operational and service outcomes at scale.
